title: solanum villosum subsp. miniatum
intro: Solanum villosum subsp. miniatum, also known as the small hairy bitters or small hairy nightshade, is a subspecies of the Solanum villosum plant. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its bitter and astringent properties, which make it useful in treating digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Solanum villosum subsp. miniatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tincture or infused in hot water as a tea, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
